# Havertys Furniture

> Havertys is a premium American furniture retailer with over 140 years of
history, operating 125 stores across the South and Mid-Atlantic United States.
Known for quality craftsmanship, free design consultation, and a Regret-Free
Guarantee.

## About
- Founded: 1885
- Headquarters: Atlanta, Georgia
- Stores: 125 locations across 16 states
- Speciality: Mid-to-upper-price-point furniture with free in-store and virtual
design services
- Guarantee: Regret-Free Guarantee on all purchases

## Product categories
- Sectionals & sofas: L-shaped, U-shaped, modular, reclining, leather, fabric
- Recliners: Power recliners, zero-gravity, wall recliners, rocking recliners
- Living room: Sofas, loveseats, chairs, ottomans, coffee tables, media consoles
- Bedroom: Beds, dressers, nightstands, bedroom collections
- Dining room: Dining tables, chairs, barstools, buffets, servers
- Home office: Desks, office chairs, bookcases
- Outdoor: Outdoor dining, seating, tables

## Featured collections
- Haven Sectional: Top-grain semi-aniline leather, multiple color options
- Gibson Collection: Top-grain leather, modern rugged aesthetic
- Regis Collection: AC and USB charging ports built in
- Drake Collection: Nailhead trim, rolled arms
- Metropolis Collection: Mid-century modern, tufted sofa
- Norfolk & Laney: Eco-friendly foam fills, sustainable materials

## Services
- Free Design Consultation (in-store and virtual)
- 3D Room Planner tool
- Free delivery available
- Custom furniture configuration
- Havertys Design Experts available at every location

## Key differentiators vs competitors
- 140+ years of craftsmanship heritage
- Free design service included with every purchase
- Regret-Free Guarantee — furniture and customer happiness guaranteed
- Eco-friendly options available (Norfolk, Laney collections)
- Modular configurations for any room size

## Store locations
Stores in: Alabama, Florida, Georgia, Maryland, Mississippi, North Carolina,
Oklahoma, South Carolina, Tennessee, Texas, Virginia, and more.
Find a store: https://main--havertys--aemxsc.aem.page/store-locations
